mapper.select: /* DRAW 상세 정보 조회 */ SELECT D.DRAW_ID , D.STORE_ID , D.LOCATION_ID , D.PRODUCT_ID , D.DRAW_NM , D.DRAW_URL , D.ENTRY_START_DATE , D.ENTRY_END_DATE , D.DRAW_DATE , D.PICKUP_START_DATE , D.PICKUP_END_DATE , D.WINNER_CNT , D.TOTAL_QTY , D.CURRENT_QTY , D.LIMIT_QTY , D.SALES_PRICE , D.STATUS , D.DESCRIPTION , IFNULL(E.ENTRY_CNT, 0) AS ENTRY_CNT/* 참여자 수 */ , IFNULL(T.TICKET_CNT, 0) AS TICKET_CNT/* 전체 티켓 수 */ FROM draw_mst D LEFT JOIN (/* 참여자 수 집계 */ SELECT DRAW_ID , COUNT(*) AS ENTRY_CNT FROM draw_entry_mst WHERE DRAW_ID = #{drawId} GROUP BY DRAW_ID ) E ON D.DRAW_ID = E.DRAW_ID LEFT JOIN (/* 티켓 수 집계 (여기서 먼저 조건 + 그룹핑) */ SELECT DRAW_ID , COUNT(*) AS TICKET_CNT FROM draw_entry_ticket WHERE DRAW_ID = #{drawId} GROUP BY DRAW_ID ) T ON D.DRAW_ID = T.DRAW_ID WHERE D.DRAW_ID = #{drawId}
mapper.update: /* batch : 노쇼 처리 */ UPDATE draw_entry_mst SET ENTRY_STATUS = 'NOSHOW' , UPDATE_DATE = NOW() WHERE DRAW_ID = #{drawId} AND ENTRY_STATUS = 'WIN' AND SALES_ID IS NULL
